name: Ability Shield
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This cute and rather unique-looking shield protects the holder from having its Ability changed by others.

name: Absorb Bulb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This single-use bulb boosts the Sp. Atk stat if the holder is damaged by a Water-type attack.

name: Adamant Crystal
description: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

name: Adamant Orb
description: A brightly shining gem to be held by Dialga. It boosts the power of Dialga's Dragon- and Steel-type moves.

name: Air Balloon
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This balloon makes the holder float in the air. If the holder is hit with an attack, the balloon will burst.

name: Aloraichium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Alolan Raichu's Thunderbolt to a Z-Move.

name: Amulet Coin
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It doubles any prize money received as long as the holder joins the battle at least once.

name: Assault Vest
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This offensive vest boosts the holder's Sp. Def stat but prevents the use of status moves.

name: Berry Sweet
description: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Berserk Gene
description: Boosts ATTACK but causes confusion.

name: Big Root
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This root boosts the amount of HP the holder restores to itself when it uses HP-stealing moves.

name: Binding Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This band boosts the power of binding moves used by the holder.

name: Black Belt
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This belt helps with focus and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

name: Black Glasses
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a pair of shady- looking glasses that boost the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

name: Black Sludge
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder is a Poison type, this sludge will gradually restore its HP. It damages any other type.

name: Blue Orb
description: A shiny blue orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.

name: Blue Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even more beautiful than usual.

name: Blunder Policy
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder misses with a move due to low accuracy, this policy will sharply boost its Speed stat.

name: Booster Energy
description: An item to be held by Pokémon with certain Abilities. The energy that fills this capsule boosts the strength of the Pokémon.

name: Bright Powder
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This glittery powder casts a tricky glare that lowers the accuracy of opposing Pokémon's moves.

name: Bug Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of bugs and will boost the power of a Bug-type move—but only once.

name: Bug Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Bug-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Buginium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Bug-type moves to Bug-type Z-Moves.

name: Burn Drive
description: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Fire type.

name: Cell Battery
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This single-use battery boosts the Attack stat if the holder is damaged by an Electric-type attack.

name: Charcoal
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a combustible fuel that boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

name: Chill Drive
description: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Ice type.

name: Choice Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious headband boosts the holder's Attack stat but only allows the use of a single move.

name: Choice Scarf
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious scarf boosts the holder's Speed stat but only allows the use of a single move.

name: Choice Specs
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These curious glasses boost the holder's Sp. Atk stat but only allow the use of a single move.

name: Cleanse Tag
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This clear, sparkling amulet protects the holder from having its stats lowered by moves used against it or by other Pokémon's Abilities.

name: Clover Sweet
description: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Cornerstone Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type during battle.

name: Covert Cloak
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hooded cloak conceals the holder, tricking the eyes of its enemies and protecting it from the additional effects of moves.

name: Damp Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to rain, the rain will persist for longer than usual.

name: Dark Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of darkness and will boost the power of a Dark-type move—but only once.

name: Dark Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Dark-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Darkinium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Dark-type moves to Dark-type Z-Moves.

name: Decidium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Decidueye's Spirit Shackle to a Z-Move.

name: Deep Sea Scale
description: An item to be held by Clamperl. This scale shines with a faint pink and boosts Clamperl's Sp. Def stat.

name: Deep Sea Tooth
description: An item to be held by Clamperl. This fang gleams a sharp silver and boosts Clamperl's Sp. Atk stat.

name: Destiny Knot
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Should the holder of this bright-red thread become infatuated, the Pokémon it is infatuated with will be similarly afflicted.

name: Douse Drive
description: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Water type.

name: Draco Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of dragons and boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

name: Dragon Fang
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

name: Dragon Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of dragons and will boost the power of a Dragon-type move—but only once.

name: Dragon Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Dragon-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Dragonium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Dragon-type moves to Dragon-type Z-Moves.

name: Dread Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of darkness and boosts the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

name: Dubious Disc
description: A transparent device overflowing with dubious data. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Earth Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of the earth and boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

name: Eevium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Eevee's Last Resort to a Z-Move.

name: Eject Button
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder is damaged by an attack, it will be switched out of battle to be replaced by another Pokémon on your team.

name: Eject Pack
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder's stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

name: Electirizer
description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of electric energy. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Electric Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of electricity and will boost the power of an Electric-type move—but only once.

name: Electric Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Electric-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Electric Seed
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the terrain becomes Electric Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

name: Electrium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Electric-type moves to Electric-type Z-Moves.

name: Everstone
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A Pokémon holding this peculiar stone is prevented from evolving.

name: Eviolite
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This mysterious evolutionary lump boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats when held by a Pokémon that can still evolve.

name: Exp. Share
description: Turning on this special device will allow all the Pokémon on your team to share in Exp. Points gained.

name: Expert Belt
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of the holder's supereffective moves.

name: Fairium Z
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

name: Fairy Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of fairies and will boost the power of a Fairy-type move—but only once.

name: Fairy Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Fairy-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Fairy Feather
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This downy feather of pure white is imbued with the essence of fairies and will boost the power of a Fairy-type move.

name: Fighting Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of the fighting spirit and will boost the power of a Fighting-type move—but only once.

name: Fighting Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Fighting-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Fightinium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fighting-type moves to Fighting-type Z-Moves.

name: Fire Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of fire and will boost the power of a Fire-type move—but only once.

name: Fire Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Fire-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Firium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fire-type moves to Fire-type Z-Moves.

name: Fist Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of the fighting spirit and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

name: Flame Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a bizarre orb that gives off heat when touched and will afflict the holder with a burn during battle.

name: Flame Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fire and boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

name: Float Stone
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This very light stone reduces the weight of the holder.

name: Flower Sweet
description: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Flying Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of flight and will boost the power of a Flying-type move—but only once.

name: Flying Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Flying-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Flyinium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Flying-type moves to Flying-type Z-Moves.

name: Focus Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder is hit with a move that should knock it out, it may be able to endure with 1 HP.

name: Focus Sash
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP and it is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP—but only once.

name: Full Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that makes the holder move slower than usual.

name: Ghost Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of ghosts and will boost the power of a Ghost-type move—but only once.

name: Ghost Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Ghost-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Ghostium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ghost-type moves to Ghost-type Z-Moves.

name: Grass Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of plants and will boost the power of a Grass-type move—but only once.

name: Grass Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Grass-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Grassium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Grass-type moves to Grass-type Z-Moves.

name: Grassy Seed
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

name: Green Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cleverer than usual.

name: Grip Claw
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder uses moves that deal damage over several turns, such as Bind or Wrap, their effects will last longer than usual.

name: Griseous Core
description: An item to be held by Giratina. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

name: Ground Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of the earth and will boost the power of a Ground-type move—but only once.

name: Griseous Orb
description: A shining gem to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Giratina's Dragon- and Ghost-type moves.

name: Ground Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Ground-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Groundium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ground-type moves to Ground-type Z-Moves.

name: Hard Stone
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

name: Hearthflame Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type during battle.

name: Heat Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to harsh sunlight, the sunlight will persist for longer than usual.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These boots protect the holder from the effects of traps and the like set on the battlefield.

name: Ice Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of ice and will boost the power of an Ice-type move—but only once.

name: Ice Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Ice-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Icicle Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ice and boosts the power of the holder's Ice-type moves.

name: Icium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ice-type moves to Ice-type Z-Moves.

name: Icy Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to snow, the snow will persist for longer than usual.

name: Incinium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Incineroar's Darkest Lariat to a Z-Move.

name: Insect Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of bugs and boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves.

name: Iron Ball
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It lowers the holder's Speed stat and makes the holder vulnerable to Ground- type moves even if it is a Flying type or is levitating.

name: Iron Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of steel and boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

name: King's Rock
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

name: Kommonium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Kommo-o's Clanging Scales to a Z-Move.

name: Lagging Tail
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A tail of something, this item is tremendously heavy and makes the holder move slower than usual.

name: Lax Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The curious aroma of this incense may cause moves to miss its holder.

name: Leek
description: An item to be held by Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts the critical-hit ratio of their moves.

name: Leftovers
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.

name: Life Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of the holder's moves, but the holder also loses a small amount of HP upon landing an attack.

name: Light Ball
description: An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

name: Light Clay
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder uses protective moves like Light Screen or Reflect, their effects will last longer than usual.

name: Loaded Dice
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This loaded dice always rolls a good number, and holding one can ensure that the holder's multistrike moves hit more times.

name: Love Sweet
description: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Luck Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It doubles any prize money received as long as the holder joins the battle at least once.

name: Lucky Egg
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's an egg filled with happiness that earns the holder extra Exp. Points.

name: Lucky Punch
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When this item is held by a Happiny, it causes the holder's critical-hit ratio to increase sharply.

name: Luminous Moss
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This single-use luminous moss boosts the Sp. Def stat if the holder is damaged by a Water-type move.

name: Lunalium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lunala's Moongeist Beam to a Z-Move.

name: Lustrous Globe
description: An item to be held by Palkia. This large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

name: Lustrous Orb
description: A beautifully shining gem to be held by Palkia. It boosts the power of Palkia's Dragon- and Water-type moves.

name: Lycanium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lycanroc's Stone Edge to a Z-Move.

name: Macho Brace
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Holding this stiff, heavy brace reduces a Pokémon's Speed in battle but allows its stats to grow more quickly.

name: Magmarizer
description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of magma energy. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

name: Magnet
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a powerful magnet that boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

name: Marshadium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Marshadow's Spectral Thief to a Z-Move.

name: Meadow Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of plants and boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

name: Mental Herb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder will be able to shake off move-binding effects to move freely— but only once.

name: Metal Coat
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

name: Metal Powder
description: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Defense stat.

name: Metronome
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of a move that's used repeatedly. Once the chain is broken, the move's power returns to normal.

name: Mewnium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mew's Psychic to a Z-Move.

name: Mimikium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mimikyu's Play Rough to a Z-Move.

name: Mind Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of psychic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

name: Miracle Seed
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a seed imbued with life force that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

name: Mirror Herb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This herb will allow the holder to mirror an opponent's stat increases to boost its own stats—but only once.

name: Misty Seed
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the terrain becomes Misty Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Sp. Def stat.

name: Muscle Band
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of the holder's physical moves.

name: Mystic Water
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This teardrop-shaped gem boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Never-Melt Ice
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a heat-repelling piece of ice that boosts the power of the holder's Ice- type moves.

name: Odd Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

name: Pikanium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Pikachu's Volt Tackle to a Z-Move.

name: Pikashunium Z
description: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Thunderbolt to a Z-Move when used by a Pikachu wearing a cap.

name: Pink Bow
description: Powers up normal-type moves.

name: Pink Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cuter than usual.

name: Pixie Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fairies and boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Poison-type moves to Poison-type Z-Moves.

name: Polkadot Bow
description: Powers up normal-type moves.

name: Power Anklet

name: Power Band

name: Power Belt

name: Power Bracer

name: Power Herb

name: Primarium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Primarina's Sparkling Aria to a Z-Move.

name: Protective Pads

name: Psychic Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Psychic-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Protector

description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Sp. Def stat.

name: Red Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cooler than usual.

description: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Rock Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of rock and will boost the power of a Rock-type move—but only once.

name: Room Service
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If Trick Room takes effect, this item will lower the holder's Speed stat.

name: Rose Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

name: Rusted Shield
description: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

name: Rusted Sword
description: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

name: Safety Goggles
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These goggles protect the holder from both sandstorm damage and the effects of powders and spores.

description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Shock Drive

name: Snorlium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Snorlax's Giga Impact to a Z-Move.

name: Snowball
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This single-use ball of snow boosts the Attack stat if the holder is damaged by an Ice-type move.

name: Soft Sand
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This loose, silky sand boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

name: Solganium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Solgaleo's Sunsteel Strike to a Z-Move.

name: Soothe Bell
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The comforting chime of this bell calms the holder, making it friendly.

name: Soul Dew
description: A wondrous orb to be held by Latios or Latias. It boosts the power of their Psychic- and Dragon-type moves.

name: Spell Tag
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

name: Splash Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of water and boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Spooky Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ghosts and boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

name: Star Sweet
description: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Steel Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of steel and will boost the power of a Steel-type move—but only once.

name: Steel Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Steel-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Steelium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Steel-type moves to Steel-type Z-Moves.

name: Sticky Barb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It damages the holder every turn and may latch on to Pokémon that make direct contact with the holder.

name: Stone Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of rock and boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

name: Strawberry Sweet
description: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Tapunium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade the tapu's Nature's Madness to a Z-Move.

name: Terrain Extender
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of terrain caused by the holder's move or Ability.

name: Thick Club
description: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. This hard bone of unknown origin boosts their Attack stat.

name: Throat Spray
description: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. This hard bone of unknown origin boosts their Attack stat.

name: Toxic Orb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a bizarre orb that exudes toxins when touched and will badly poison the holder during battle.

name: Toxic Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of poison and boosts the power of the holder's Poison-type moves.

name: Twisted Spoon
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

name: Ultranecrozium Z
description: It's a crystal that turns Necrozma fused with Solgaleo or Lunala into a new form.

name: Utility Umbrella
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

name: Water Gem
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of water and will boost the power of a Water-type move—but only once.

name: Water Memory
description: A memory disc that contains Water-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokémon.

name: Waterium Z
description: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Water-type moves to Water-type Z-Moves.

name: Wave Incense
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Weakness Policy
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This policy boosts the holder's Attack and Sp. Atk. stats for a while if the holder is hit with a move it's weak to.

name: Wellspring Mask
description: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type during battle.

name: White Herb
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle—but only once.

name: Wide Lens
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves.

name: Wise Glasses
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of the holder's special moves.

name: Yellow Scarf
description: When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even tougher than usual.

name: Zap Plate
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of electricity and boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

name: Zoom Lens
description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

name: Aguav Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Apicot Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its Sp. Def stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

name: Aspear Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen.

name: Babiri Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Steel-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Belue Berry
description: Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Beauty. This Berry is rare in other regions.

name: Bluk Berry
description: Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Beauty. Its blue flesh is dry if eaten.

name: Charti Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Rock-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Cheri Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to free itself from paralysis.

name: Chesto Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to shake off its drowsiness.

name: Chilan Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a Normal-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Chople Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Coba Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Flying-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Colbur Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dark-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Cornn Berry
description: Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Beauty. This Berry is rare in other regions.

name: Custap Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to act faster should it find itself in a pinch—but only for the next move it uses.

name: Durin Berry
description: Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Cleverness. This Berry is rare in other regions.

name: Enigma Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to regain some HP if it is hit with a supereffective move.

name: Figy Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Ganlon Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its Defense stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

name: Golden Nanab Berry
description: A Berry that drastically calms Pokémon you're trying to catch when given to them.

name: Golden Pinap Berry
description: A Berry that makes you drastically more likely to get an item when given to Pokémon you're trying to catch.

name: Golden Razz Berry
description: A Berry that makes it drastically easier to catch Pokémon when given to them.

name: Grepa Berry
description: If a Pokémon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Sp. Def stat.

name: Haban Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dragon-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Hondew Berry
description: If a Pokémon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Hopo Berry
description: A Berry that can be fed to a Pokémon to restore its PP. If a wild Pokémon eats one of these Berries, that Pokémon's reactions will be dulled.

name: Iapapa Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Jaboca Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a physical move, the attacker will also take damage.

name: Kasib Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ghost-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Kebia Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Poison-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Kee Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a physical move, the holder's Defense stat will be boosted.

name: Kelpsy Berry
description: If a Pokémon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Attack stat.

name: Lansat Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its critical-hit ratio will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

name: Leppa Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 PP to a move.

name: Liechi Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its Attack stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

name: Lum Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of any status condition it may have.

name: Mago Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Magost Berry

name: Maranga Berry
description: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the holder's Sp. Def stat will be boosted.

name: Micle Berry
description: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its accuracy will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch—but only for the next move it uses.
